prompt:
Subject: Summer Wink

Person/Expression:
A woman in her 20s. Fair skin leaning towards bright ivory beige, with a natural skin texture containing a subtle pink flush. Soft highlights on cheeks, tip of the nose, shoulders, and collarbone. Pale rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eyeshadow, long slender eyelashes, natural undereye bags, light brown eyebrows, and sheer pink-beige lip gloss. Winking one eye and smiling brightly showing teeth. Clear, small catchlights in the eyes.

Clothing/Pose:
A loose pale coral pink off-the-shoulder T-shirt tied lightly at the waist, with a turquoise-colored swimsuit strap slightly visible underneath. Light blue distressed denim shorts, barefoot. Upper body tilted slightly forward, with the person's right hand raised next to the face with fingers naturally spread. The left hand is along the left thigh. Weight placed on the leg on the right side of the screen, with the other leg extended diagonally forward, creating a light summer S-shaped silhouette.

Background/Light:
A beach-house style terrace with white wooden walls by the seaside. White window frames on the right, and a bright wooden deck under the sunlight at the feet. Blurred palm leaves in the back left, white railings, and the distant blue sea and sky. Main light is strong summer sunlight from the upper left. Brightly illuminating the face, shoulders, arms, and front of the legs, with shadows falling toward the bottom right on the deck. Reflected light from the white walls and floor softens skin shadows.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical 3:4 aspect ratio. Full body portrait. The person is placed large in the center-to-right of the screen, including the feet naturally. Camera is at a slight low angle from a position lower than the waist, at a moderate distance. Focus is on the face and upper body, with the background shallowly blurred enough to retain the seaside atmosphere.

Texture/Style:
Realistic photography-style AI image. Bright and clean finish like a summer magazine spread. Skin is not overly polished, leaving natural texture and luster. Hair is light milk tea ash brown, with thin see-through bangs, face-framing layers, and medium-long length below the shoulders. Ends are loosely curled inward, with fine highlights, natural bundles, and a small amount of carefully depicted stray hairs. Realistic depiction of thin T-shirt fabric, denim wear, and dry wood grain.

Negative:
Unnatural face or gaze, excessive skin retouching, plastic-like skin, extra or missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, floating feet, unnatural gravity, shadows inconsistent with the light source, extreme deformation of legs or arms, unwanted people or objects, readable text, logos, or watermarks.
